summary:
AMERICAN REVIVAL AND DIVINE OUTPOURING: Brandon foresees a massive spiritual awakening in America, predicting a harvest of souls so large that colossal venues like the Dallas Cowboys Stadium and Texas Motor Speedway will be unable to accommodate the crowds. Brandon describes a future event reminiscent of a Holy Ghost Woodstock, where immense fields will be flooded with people seeking healing and experiencing the glory of God, leading to significant logistical challenges due to the sheer volume of attendees.

COLOMBIAN LEADERSHIP AND CARTEL THREATS: Brandon recounts a vivid vision concerning a conservative, bearded political leader in Colombia who faces severe danger for combatting government corruption and the drug cartel. Brandon details macabre intimidation tactics, including the delivery of severed heads in boxes, and describes a demonic thirty-year-old witch capable of shapeshifting into a bat and a werewolf to spy on cabinet meetings. Brandon advises this leader to apply anointing oil to his home, vehicles, and office to create a divine hedge of protection, ensuring an impending era of profound spiritual revival across South America.

MIDDLE EAST CONFLICT AND CUBAN LIBERATION: Brandon warns of a devastating nocturnal attack on Israel near Damascus, describing it as potentially worse than the events of October Seventh, while also noting the recent capture of hidden Hezbollah drone factories and chemical weapons inside a Lebanese mountain. Shifting focus to Cuba, Brandon predicts a sudden military liberation involving Navy SEALs and spearheaded by Marco Rubio, which will trigger massive financial breakthroughs and creative miracles on the island. Brandon also claims that a Cold War-era weapon of mass destruction, gifted by Russia and encased in lead, remains hidden in a Cuban mountain, and notes that the current Cuban leader is practicing dark magic and using a stunt double.

EUROPEAN UPHEAVAL AND END TIME FINANCES: Brandon comments on shifting global dynamics, referring to the French leader as a tyrannical precursor to the Antichrist and noting demonic rituals occurring at Stonehenge during the summer solstice. Furthermore, Brandon discusses visions of CERN opening demonic portals and a new digital age involving Elon Musk, alongside a massive financial outpouring designated for the church. Brandon identifies specific ministers, such as Rodney Howard-Browne, who are divinely appointed to receive immense wealth to fund end-time gospel initiatives, emphasizing the necessity of spiritual maturity to handle such financial abundance.

SPIRITUAL WARFARE AND BIBLICAL DELIVERANCE: Brandon transitions into a deep teaching on overcoming depression, addiction, and demonic oppression, using the metaphor of a distressed Caucasian individual lost at sea on a white sailboat surrounded by sharks to illustrate God's pursuit of isolated souls. Brandon forcefully advocates for utilizing the Bible as a spiritual weapon and daily sustenance, urging believers to meditate on specific scriptures of joy to combat despair rather than engaging in digital distractions like doom-scrolling. Furthermore, Brandon forewarns of a catastrophic economic crash reminiscent of the 1930s, stressing that only those deeply rooted in scripture and spiritual discipline will possess the resilience to survive and assist others.

LEADERSHIP INTERCESSION AND PROPHETIC DISCERNMENT: Brandon specifically intercedes for the physical protection of Donald Trump Jr., citing visions of an impending assassination attempt involving a firearm, while also extending a spiritual shield over the entire Trump family, J.D. Vance, and Marco Rubio. Concluding with a stark warning to the Christian community, Brandon vehemently criticizes modern false prophets on online platforms who propagate unbiblical doctrines such as a reverse rapture, urging believers to cultivate personal spiritual discernment and rely solely on the foundational truths of scripture.
rawData: [June 23, 2026]-[Come pray with me]-[https://youtu.be/MlCLrdfztps]-[All right, well, good evening, family. Thank you for joining us again tonight. We're going to pray. I have some things to share with you that I saw today when I was in my own prayer time, and some of it's kind of disturbing. But I'm just going to be bold in what I say and say exactly what I saw. I don't know—you can pray with it, you can pray over it. A lot of times when the Lord shows me these things, I don't know what I'm supposed to do other than keep interceding like I always do. But when you have a crowd that the Lord has blessed me with, and all y'all coming over here, you prayer warriors know how to pray and intercede for other nations. Now, I usually get assignments for America, and I pray for Trump all the time. I feel like my main mission has been praying over our nation for revival, for an awakening under God, and for America to have one last call—one last push for a harvest of souls bigger than what we've ever seen before. God's not done with America yet. I truly believe we're about to see the greatest harvest, the greatest demonstrations, and manifestations of the glory of God in our churches and our stadiums. I don't believe that we have room enough to receive all that we're about to receive as far as the outpouring and the souls. There are 340 million people in America—or 344—but I believe the Dallas Cowboys Stadium is not big enough. I believe it will be like Charlie Kirk's funeral, where they had to have the overflow of 77 or 80,000 people plus the overflow next door, because there was not enough room for just a funeral for his home-going service. I keep seeing a major move of God in America, a major move of God in Latino nations, and in Asia and Africa. There will be a Holy Ghost Woodstock with fields full of people because the coliseums and even the Texas Motor Speedway can't hold all the people for what's about to happen. I saw a Holy Ghost Woodstock with fields full of people as far as the eye could see, coming for healing and demonstrations and manifestations of the glory. It was the parking that was the problem; there was no place to put all the cars. Think about that. Have you ever been to a major event and you have to walk blocks away from the stadium because there's no place to park? And then you want to leave early because it's terrible to even get out for traffic because the traffic's so bad to leave. So, I think it's interesting whenever the Lord speaks to me like he did today concerning Colombia. I was shown to pray for the new president or prime minister—whoever this is with the beard—and the Lord had me interceding for this man because of the attacks that will come against his life as he comes against the cartel and the corruption in Colombia. I saw in great detail that the cartel was planning something. He has two friends—one with a beard and another man that looked younger—and the cartel severed their heads and sent them to him in a box as a warning. The Lord showed me major attempts on this man's life, and he's a conservative from what I understand. In prayer, I saw him giving praise and glory to Jesus for winning the election yesterday. But I saw major disruption as he tries to come against the cartel and corruption in his government. His life was in danger. They use an intimidation tactic in the days ahead to eliminate people that he knows, and they take their body parts and give them to him, trying to tell him, 'You do what we tell you to do, or you're next. Your family, your wife, your kids, whatever.' I saw boxes full of his friends; it was very dark. As I was interceding and praying, I could see a woman about 30 years old, and she was a witch. The Lord let me see this woman—that she was able to transform into a dog and into bats. It was demonic; she would turn into like a werewolf. I could see her spying on this man and his cabinet meetings in the days ahead. She would know what was coming, like the prophets in the Bible who knew where the kings would be, and they would go back and tell the good king what was coming so they would be ahead of the plan. I saw his plan unfolding, trying to help the government, but they would be ahead of him because of the witch. They knew he was coming after the coke plants and the drug cartel. The witch would transform into a bat—it's demonic—and it would split into two. They would fly and she would be watching and able to listen, then go back and tell them where he was coming. But the Lord said, 'If you anoint the room and your family with oil, I will provide a hedge of protection so they won't hear what you're going to do.' I saw anointing oil dripping from the post and the Lord said this would be applied as faith, like his blood. The blood will shield you from the demonic coming against you, sir. I saw the blood of Jesus covering him, and I saw an angel go before him. He'll have great favor to bring great revival in Colombia in the days ahead. There'll be a major move of God in Colombia. For the Lord said, 'I want a great harvest of souls in Colombia.' A 'shaking to awaken' will come to the people of Colombia, and there'll be witchcraft spirits that have never been tested before, but the glory of God will go into Colombia and shake that nation. He said, 'Pray for this man, for I have put him there.' I saw a shaking in Brazil and across South America, and there'll be a great revival coming. A harvest of souls like we've never seen before will come into South America. The same will be with South Korea and a lot of nations. It was interesting as I was seeing into his office; I saw a lot of wood, and I saw this woman lurking in the shadows. It's about stopping drug trafficking, sex trafficking, and this demonic agenda to kill, steal, and destroy. God wants to raise up a generation of Holy Ghost and fire. But we've got to get out of the lukewarm seeker-friendly stuff. The enemy is ahead of us because we don't embrace the supernatural in the church; we push it away. We attack the laughing, the healing, and people getting set free from demonic spirits, saying, 'That's not for today.' If Jesus cast out devils, we cast out devils. Go into all the world, lay hands on the sick, raise the dead, and do the Great Commission. But the church has gone limp-wristed. They have no backbone. We have let the enemy take ground that should be ours. Greater is he that is in us than he that is in the world. Jesus Christ paid the price for you to walk in victory over the devil. The Devil shouldn't be running over you. We should be running over him. Why? Because He defeated him once and for all. And we're wall-to-wall Holy Ghost. Christ in me, the hope of glory. And the church—the reason why we're not seeing results is because the preachers aren't preaching repentance, they're not preaching holiness, and they're not preaching the soon-coming of the Lord Jesus Christ. And tonight, I'm here to tell you Jesus is coming. And it's time to get off of our blessed assurance and get our heinies into motion and do what God's called us to do so we don't lose another generation. I see movements come and I see movements go. People talk about the Word of Faith movement, the skinny jean fog machine movement. You've got all these different movements. I say let's just stay filled. Let's just stay filled with the Holy Ghost. The Holy Spirit's always talking. He's always imparting. He's always leading. He's always guiding. There's always new wine and new wineskins. The moment you go before Him and you spend time with Him, He will fill your cup to overflow. But there's a lot of you who don't even have anything in your cup anymore. Your cup has become empty. And God is calling a new generation to rise up and tell the people that the soon-coming of the Lord is at hand. I get so tired of the labels and the charismatic flakiness—pretending you have it when you lost it a long time ago. Go back to where you lost it and find out what you did to grieve the Holy Spirit in your life and say, 'Lord, I repent,' and get right with Him and get your cup filled up again. All you have to do is surrender all, and He'll fill your cup to overflow. But I see these visions of these demonic people who are so obsessed and possessed with demonic spirits trying to kill, steal, and destroy because they see fruit in what they do. But the body of Christ is just like, 'Well, we'll go out and we'll have a little five-minute sermon with a little bit of something for 30 minutes or whatever. We're in and out. We'll make sure we take up the offering.' We've got to stop playing church like this. As I'm seeing in Colombia, the Lord said this man is in danger. And I thought, 'Dear God, Lord, you're giving me another assignment for another man.' And so then I found out he watches me. That's why I'm talking this way. I found out he watches my channel and he knows that I pray. I was told by a pastor, because I told him what I saw today, and he said, 'He watches you. He knows who you are.' So the reason I'm bringing this up, sir, is because I know you watch. I'm saying it in front of thousands of people, but I'm trying to tell you there's an assignment against your life. There's an assignment against your friends. But Jesus Christ will have you if you pray and you anoint your house with oil. Anoint your car with oil. Anoint your plane with oil—your jet, all the things that God has for you to do for Him. Anoint the things you have as president of your country, and Jesus will be with you. Great revival is coming to your nation, sir. Jesus Christ has a plan for Colombia. I'm excited. We prayed for you to win, and I'm excited that you won, sir. Know that you have a friend in America and that we're praying for you continually, that you will finish your assignment and you will accomplish what God has called you to do because you have a group of people praying for you. But allow Jesus to become so real to your house. Allow Jesus to become real to your cabinet. Make Him a priority. Take no counsel from the ungodly, and don't allow the cartel to push you into doing what they want you to do. Rise up against the corruption in your country, sir, and we're praying for you. But allow Jesus to be preached in your nation without any hindrance. In fact, if you could even sponsor that with your funding of your nation, the more you preach Jesus, the more your nation is going to change. The more you let Jesus be preached from the highways and the byways, Jesus will change your nation, sir. Not a dead, watered-down religion, but a religion that's full of the Holy Ghost and fire. That's what's going to change your nation. So anoint your office with oil. Anoint your place with oil. And I believe the blood of Jesus covers you, and you'll be protected. God bless you. All right, do you have any more? Anything else to say? I said what the Lord told me to say. All right. So we see in Israel today, we have been praying for Israel. And this is the attack, I believe, the Lord showed us an event taking place in Israel that was worse than October 7th. He said it will happen in the middle of the night to pray, and it will be up by Damascus. He said, 'Pray for Israel.' And I saw a major attack coming. Now, today the IDF captured Hezbollah drones, factories, and launch sites hidden inside a Southern Lebanon mountain. All glory to God. They have drones, they have all kinds of craziness, bombs, and everything else. There's more. I hear it. There's more. There are chemical weapons that they want to use against Israel in the days ahead in spray form, and they want to hurt a lot of people. So this is interesting. Don't you think that's interesting? These are all on the side of a mountain. This took a lot of money and a lot of time to build this in a mountain, hmm? Is that it, son? Yeah. This is all closed, but you can still buy it if you want. Well, I just felt that was important that they saw that they captured that today. Now, I want you to see Marco Rubio today. I told you a liberation of the Cuban people was coming, and it's coming sooner than you think. It will happen in the middle of the night. You'll wake up the next morning and you're going to hear that Cuba was liberated with our great Navy SEALs. Watch what God is about to do in Cuba. There will be a major revival in Cuba. I keep telling you this. There will be three major churches. I saw wells of churches rising up out of there, and healings and creative miracles will start to take place in Cuba. And the Lord said, 'I have not forgotten the Cuban people.' Watch what God is about to do, and a great financial breakthrough will come for the Cuban people. And I said Rubio will lead the charge. Rubio will lead the charge, and he will slay his tens of thousands, and you will see the other man have his thousands, but he will not rise up. And he'll be a very strong leader concerning Cuba in the days ahead. This is what I keep seeing concerning this man, and He said, 'Pray for him.' And Byron Donalds, the Black man with the beard. Okay, now play this. Here's what I can tell you. Cuba not only has weapons that they've acquired from Russia and China over the years, but they also host Russian and Chinese intelligence presence in their country, not far from where we're standing right now. So Cuba's always posed a national security threat to the United States. They, by the way, have been one of the leading sponsors of terrorism in the entire region. You look at the groups that work out of Colombia that have destabilized that country over the years with full support from this regime over there. So Cuba's consistently posed a threat to the national security of the United States. And the other thing that poses a threat to the national security of the United States is to have a failed state 90 miles from our shores run by friends of our adversaries. So he said Russia and China have given them weapons. I said I saw encased in the mountain a weapon that was a briefcase that was given to them by Russia in the Cold War, encased in lead. And it was thick, encased in lead, so that the sniffers could not smell it. And I saw American planes flying over, and they were trying to sniff anything. It was in the mountain, and it was encased in lead. It was thick. But there is a weapon of mass destruction, like an atom bomb, like it was on Hiroshima. And it's in Cuba. And I saw it was given to them by Russia for a trade concerning the Cuban Missile Crisis back when Kennedy was in office. It was back in that time frame. It's a device. It's something around that time frame, maybe '80s, I don't know. I keep trying to pinpoint it when I'm praying, but it was during this time frame. There's turmoil with Russia. Okay? So, I know there's a big difference between the '60s and '80s, but it's not now, it was back then. And so, I keep seeing that it was encased in lead. Now, I don't know why, but the Lord said it's in lead. And it's a wall. So, we found this video. They're talking about the missiles, and this is Iran and what they're on. Okay, go ahead and play it. I want to see it. Wow, they look broken. They're not very good missiles, are they? It kind of looks like a run-down place, like they took the parts out and just left it and abandoned it. Yeah, maybe they knew they were coming. Probably did, because it doesn't look like there's anything good in those totes. I mean, those bombs look old and rusted, like junk. It's like a whole underground city, huh? Yeah, what's all this destroyed here? I know. It looks like they messed it up or somebody did. Look at those—are those drones? Parts for drones? Yeah, this looks like parts of drones. Interesting. So, I want to say this, whether or not they've taken that lead object off of the island now because they know they're coming, I don't know. I saw pirates and I kept hearing the Bay of Pigs, covering up evidence from the Bay of Pigs, and there was something concerning pirates. I don't understand; I saw these men removing things from Cuba and taking it to another location because they didn't want it to be left there. And I saw the longer they wait, the more they're trying to destroy and remove things that they needed to be removed. They know that they're done. But it was the Castro family. It was the bloodline. It's the people. There's demonic things that are attached to it, and that's why I said the other man has a stunt double. He has a man that looks just like him; he made him look like him. He has his hair slicked back. And it was an evil man that's the leader of Cuba. And he was practicing some kind of dark magic, too, against Trump, but we know what's about to happen and the greatest revival that this world has ever seen before is about to happen. That's what we focus on. All right. So, is there anything else, Son? Nasty news, is it? Yeah, man. It's kind of a slow news day. And this guy right here is holding hands with Macron. I've never seen a man that's straight hold hands like this. Maybe that's a European thing. But dudes here in America don't do that. That guy—God help him. I said he's the Ishmael to the Antichrist. He is not the Antichrist, but he will rise up like a tyrant in the days ahead, and he's doing it. And I said when he stops being in France as the leader of France in the days ahead, you're going to see him branch off and do other things. He's not done. You won't see the last of him. I've seen him rise up and everybody's going to think he's the Antichrist. He's not the Antichrist. All right. Keep going. Are we done? Yeah. Okay. All right. Well, that was short tonight. There's not a lot of news out. Here's Starmer. He resigned and all that. And then the one guy in England resigned today, which I thought that was kind of interesting. We'll see what happens with that. Who's the next leader of England? Why did he resign? He was crying when he resigned. I thought that was kind of interesting. So, he was sad. Yeah. And then Ursula von der Leyen, whatever. Ursula. She is a piece of work. It can take many leaders years to grow into the statesman you've become in just two years. European and Ukraine society is stronger because of you. Security. Well, let's see what happens next. All right, is that it? Yeah. All right, let's pray. Let's just jump in the river and we'll pray and we'll just seek the Lord. Next week—isn't that amazing? Where is the year going? It's already half over. We're already in the third quarter. Is that amazing to say that? The economy, people are freaking out, all this stuff going on, and the peace agreement. We don't know if we have peace; we do if we have peace, we don't know who's telling the truth. Iran is—it's just crazy. It's political theater. You don't know what to believe. What is going on with the media? Anymore, I just don't care. Y'all just figure it out. We know what the Lord is saying. We're getting so close to His return, so that's why I'm focused on what I'm concerned about is the enemy within, the attacks on American churches, they're burning our churches, doing things in the days ahead, praying for New Orleans, praying for a black swan event in our nation, praying for major shakings. Last night we saw financial outpouring. The Lord was telling us about financial outpouring. It was attached to the summer solstice. I saw great dark witchcraft around Stonehenge, and my son found this and they were all doing some kind of weird demonic thing, raising their hands. I don't know what these idiots are doing, but they're raising their hands, worshipping or doing something. I know that doesn't look—they're not out there having a church party. So, this is what the Lord was showing me. Demonic—this is evil. And so I was praying about this. Why do you say no sound? What? There's sound on mine. No sound? They took me out. Did I say something dark? Somebody said I have sound. No sound. I might have no sound. I say things... Well, that was short. Now, we know what the Lord is doing. Some kind of weird demonic thing. But they're not... Okay. Is it okay? Are we going to pray? Did YouTube block us? I can hear. Okay, there's sound. I can hear. Mine is fine. Sound is good. Refresh. Okay, I'm just going to keep going. If y'all just pray for... I haven't said anything I don't think that is too over the top tonight like I normally do, but you know, I know that I'm being censored. Some things I say they don't like. Some things I say they do. So I had to refresh. All right. Okay. Father, we just thank You, Lord, that we're able to speak and speak freely on First Amendment rights. Father, and I thank You, Lord, for the platform that we do it on. We plead the blood of Jesus over this livestream, and I thank You, Lord, that we're able to be bold and say the things that You tell us to say. We cover our nations. We cover our time of prayer, and we thank You, Lord, that it's uninterrupted and unhindered by any satanic or demonic force. We apply the blood of Jesus over our livestream tonight. And we thank You, Lord, that Father, that You get the victory. You have the glory. But as I was seeing into CERN and I saw demonic portals being opened up and I saw Elon Musk's face. I saw the digital age, a new digital age coming. I saw breakthrough in finances. I saw a major move of finances. And it was interesting because I saw Rodney Howard-Browne there. I've never met this man other than one time I shook his hand and he said hello to me whenever we were in a tunnel at a crusade. And he shook his hand and he goes, 'Hi.' And he waved or whatever, but I saw his face and I just thought it was interesting. I don't fellowship or go down to Florida with Rodney Howard-Browne, but I admire people and you just go, 'Well, praise the Lord, God's using them,' and people are getting saved. But I thought it was interesting that I saw this man, and the Lord said he's about to become extremely wealthy from investments, and he'll be a funder of the River Church and the finances concerning the River Church. I saw great supernatural—he said he sowed his time. He has sacrificially given, and the Lord is about to multiply him more than what I could see, like a billionaire—like big-time money on this guy. And so I thought it was interesting. It was the same thing I saw about John Kilpatrick's church and other churches, that God was raising up big-time people that knew how to deal with money to be able to fund the end-time gospel. You give money to a fool and it'd destroy him, but you give it to somebody that knows how to use money, and it's a tool to him. It won't destroy him. There are certain people that God has marked to be end-time funders. And the Lord was showing me that this man with the blonde hair is an end-time funder, and he will be a great asset to the body of Christ in the days ahead to fund the gospel. I thought it was interesting because there are certain people the Lord said you can't trust with money because it'll destroy them; they're not mature enough spiritually to handle it. But some people are just born and have what it takes to do it. That's what the Lord was showing me about this man. And when I saw Stonehenge, I saw demonic activity around the summer solstice. I was praying about a major shift from now going into fall, a change of financial things, praying about the Clarity Act, and praying against all the stuff that's about to happen. That's why I'm trying to tell you all how close we are. The Lord kept saying, 'This is the rocket fuel for the end-time rocket.' Everything's getting put in position. I saw the angel again with the blue eyes in the vision, saying, 'Shh, hush now. They can't hear it if they're not dead to self.' If they're not dead to self, the money will destroy them. It was about being a good steward over what God has given us and having character. I thought it was interesting, some of the things the Lord had us praying over last night. Braden, what else did he show us last night? Did you take notes? When we were praying, my main thing was praying over this man in Colombia today. Is that good? All right, let's take communion and pray. Father, we just thank you, Lord, for your body that you took for us. We're praying for healings and getting them. I'm telling you, we got so many emails from people getting healed—teeth being healed, backs being healed. All glory to God! I am so excited about all the healings. Diana said, 'Brandon, there's so many people getting healed.' Last night and today we have testimonies of people saying, 'I am completely healed by the power of God through the broadcast.' They were just so excited. I'm going to tell you immediately: it's all Jesus. It's amazing, and I know a lot of you know that, but I always want to tell you, Brandon can't heal a fly. Jesus Christ flows and he does it. Isn't he wonderful? Isn't Jesus wonderful? We attract to deflect, and I always make sure we say that because we don't have anything. It's the same thing as saying, 'You see.' I don't see anything; he allows me to. He allows me to tell you what's happening whenever he comes and shows me. I'm so thankful that he shows us that which is to come, like the Bible said he would. He gives visions, signs, and wonders, and he's an amazing God. He puts the super on our natural. Father, I thank you that you put your super on the natural. We humble ourselves and pray. We thank you as a nation; we turn from our wicked ways, and you said you would heal our land. Father, I thank you for our president. We thank you for this time of prayer tonight. We lift up the body, and we give you all the glory, honor, and praise. I heard the air raid sirens—I could hear them blowing—and I knew that there was a major event. I saw a storm coming. Thank you, Father, that you show us that which is to come. We take the body and remember what you did for us, and by your stripes, we're healed. We take this in the mighty name of Jesus. Amen and amen. Lord, we thank you for the blood. We make much of the blood, and the blood makes much of us. We apply the blood of Jesus and cover our houses, our families, and our finances; we cover everything we need to cover. We plead the blood of Jesus, we anoint our heads with oil, and our cup runneth over. Surely goodness and mercy follow us, Lord. Thank you for your healing and your deliverance. Thank you for all that you've done and for paying the price with your precious blood. We apply the blood of Jesus in the name of Jesus. All right. Now, Lord, if there's anything you want to show me today, anything you want to show us, or anything that you need us to pray about, Father, we are yielded to you, uninterrupted and unhindered by any satanic or demonic force. I apply the blood of Jesus over my spiritual eyes, and I thank you, Lord, that I am not snared by any satanic or demonic force. We apply the blood, Father, and thank you, Lord, for healing the people. We thank you that the people are healed tonight. We thank you, Lord, for President Trump and his family. We prayed over Don Jr. last night. I saw a storm about Don Jr., and the Lord said specifically to pray for Don Jr.’s protection. Again, I keep seeing them trying to physically harm him with a shot, a bullet. The Lord said we must pray for his protection continually; there's a planned assassination attempt against his life, against Don Jr. We pray for Don Jr. and his protection. He's the only child that stands out to me more than any of them, so we cover him in the blood. So, Father, we cover Eric, Tiffany, Barron, Ivanka, and Don Jr.—all of them. I thank you, Lord, for the grandkids and the family. We apply the blood of Jesus over Donald Trump's family, his marriage, the First Lady, the second lady, Vice President J.D. Vance, and Marco Rubio and his family. I cover every single one of them. We cover President Trump, and no weapon formed against him will prosper. May he take no counsel from the ungodly. We put a hedge of blood all around him tonight, Father, that he sleeps well. He sleeps soundly—good REM sleep. May he have good dreams of heaven and heavenly places, Father. Speak to him in the midnight hour and tell him how to lead the nation. Fill my cup, Lord; we lift it up, Lord. Come and quench this thirsting of our soul. Bread of heaven, feed me till I want no more. Fill our cup; fill it up and make me whole. Fill my cup, Lord. I lift it up, Lord. Come and quench this thirsting of our soul. Bread of heaven, feed me till I want no more. Fill my cup; fill it up and make me whole. I want you to go to the first part of the verse: 'Like the woman at the well, I was seeking for things that could not satisfy. And then I heard my Savior speaking, "Draw from the well that never shall run dry."' I love that first part. 'Like the woman at the well, I was seeking for things that could not satisfy. And then I heard my Savior speaking, "Draw from my well that never shall run dry."' Fill my cup, Lord. I lift it up, Lord. Come and quench this thirsting of my soul.
